response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR date : date
ATTR departure_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane : varchar : FK
ATTR airline : varchar : FK

ENTITY Passenger
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, crew_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_code : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY SeatAssignment
PK passenger_code, flight_code
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : FK
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 0..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_code
REL SeatAssignment -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passenger_code
REL SeatAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
